GameStateGlobal.title: GameStateGlobal
GameStateGlobal.description: Global event control state managed by administrators.

gameActive.description: Indicates whether the game is started by the admin.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the event went live (in epoch milliseconds).

Participant.title: Participant
Participant.description: Records and stats for an active competitor/participant.

userId.description: Unique user ID of the participant

name.description: Code Name or Display Name of the competitor

registrationId.description: Official college registration / student ID number

college.description: College or University name of the operator

clearedLevels.description: Total number of levels successfully completed (0 to 12)

timeTaken.description: Total active seconds or milliseconds spent on solving tasks

hintsRemaining.description: Remaining hints remaining from the 5 starting hints.

finalTime.description: Score computed as: timeTaken - hintsRemaining * 10 (or equivalent adjusted final time).

/gameState/{docId}.description: Global settings path for activation states of the event.
